loop_principle.step_4: Exclude P3 transport/readout candidates incompatible with those operators and overlaps.
loop_principle.step_5: Pass only the surviving candidate classes back to engineering P3 experiments.

bridge_to_engineering.core_statement: P3 should stop testing family-agnostic transport geometries and instead test only family-conditioned transport/readout candidates.
bridge_to_engineering.project_statement: This converts theory-track outputs into a concrete pruning loop for engineering-track P3.

single_global_smooth_object_chart.reason: atlas separation and cross-family margin are too large relative to within-family variation

family_agnostic_isotropic_update_cone.reason: cross-family probes show local admissible directions are family-dependent rather than globally uniform

full_object_disc_overlap_everywhere.reason: current P3 bottleneck still localizes at U_object INTERSECT U_disc rather than disappearing globally

direct_readout_equals_object_geometry.reason: earlier C43-C45 failures show direct readout compression damages manifold quality

verdict.core_answer: The theory track can now drive a concrete exclusion loop for P3 rather than only producing broad hypotheses.
verdict.next_theory_target: connect surviving family-conditioned transport candidates to the next engineering P3 search block
